overall.description: A third-person traversal sequence in a cyberpunk video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character moving along the exterior ledge of a megabuilding during sunset. The camera overlooks a sprawling futuristic cityscape with distinctive spherical architecture, construction cranes, and neon-lit structures while the character's shadow is cast against the building wall.

agents.ego_description: carefully traversing along the narrow exterior ledge of a skyscraper, high above the city streets, with their shadow cast on the building wall

entered.detail: tall industrial building exterior with metal panels, vents, and structural details
vertical red glowing light strips mounted on the building facade
tall construction cranes visible against the skyline in the distance
dense collection of futuristic high-rise buildings and towers
shadow of the player character cast on the building wall, showing a humanoid figure with a weapon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character traversing a narrow ledge high on a megabuilding's exterior. The industrial facade dominates the right side with distinctive red neon strips, while construction cranes and a dense urban skyline stretch into the hazy distance. The character's shadow is prominently cast on the wall, indicating the low-angle sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: megabuilding corner with view of stadium district

events.description: large spherical stadium structure emerges into view on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the ledge as the cityscape opens up to reveal a massive spherical building

entered.detail: massive spherical building with ribbed exterior structure, resembling a giant dome or arena
blue glowing rectangular signs visible on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the ledge, the view opens to reveal a massive spherical stadium dominating the left side of the frame. The megabuilding facade recedes slightly to the right while neon billboards glow in the distant left. The traversal maintains a steady pace with the sunset casting long shadows across the industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook of city street grid

events.description: camera angle shifts downward revealing the city streets and elevated highways far below

agents.ego_description: continuing the traversal while the perspective shifts to show the depth of the city below

entered.detail: network of roads and intersections visible far below the traversal height
multi-level highway interchange structures winding through the urban landscape

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera tilts downward to reveal the dizzying height above the city streets, showing the complex network of elevated highways and roads far below. The megabuilding facade moves to the far right edge while the spherical stadium recedes into the distance. The warm sunset light bathes the entire cyberpunk cityscape in orange and purple hues as the traversal continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high-altitude industrial ledge that gradually reveals the dizzying scale of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at sunset. It begins with a close view of a character traversing a megabuilding's facade, where red neon strips and the character's own long shadow contrast against the hazy urban skyline. As the character advances, the perspective opens to the left to reveal a massive spherical stadium and glowing distant billboards, shifting the focus from the building's wall to the architectural wonders of the city. The scene then culminates as the camera tilts downward, transitioning from the horizon to a vertical plunge that exposes a complex network of elevated highways far below. Finally, the entire cityscape is bathed in deep orange and purple hues as the spherical stadium recedes into the distance.
